artifacts.description: Adds various treasure items that can be found through exploration

gallery.description: Increases the wearer's movement speed after taking damage. Found in abandoned mineshafts, bastion treasure chests & pillager outposts
gallery.title: Panic Necklace

gallery.description: Applies a haste effect after eating food
gallery.title: Onion Ring

gallery.description: Greatly reduces the duration of negative effects. Found in strongholds, bastion treasure chests & village temples
gallery.title: Antidote Vessel

gallery.description: Creepers avoid the wearer. Found in jungle temples, buried treasure chests & village tanneries
gallery.title: Kitty Slippers

gallery.description: Causes the wearer's melee attacks to absorb health. Found in mineshafts, desert pyramids & village armorers
gallery.title: Vampiric Glove

gallery.description: Applies an extra level of looting to killed entities. Found in pillager outposts, strongholds, large underwater ruins & mineshafts
gallery.title: Superstitious Hat

gallery.description: Allows the wearer to walk on powder snow, and makes ice less slippery
gallery.title: Snowshoes

gallery.description: Increases the speed of ridden mounts
gallery.title: Cowboy Hat

gallery.description: Not consumed when eaten. Dropped by cows killed by players, found in bastion stables & village butchers
gallery.title: Everlasting Beef/Eternal Steak

gallery.description: Can be used both as a shield and as a glider. Found in buried treasure chests, desert pyramids & village tanneries
gallery.title: Umbrella

gallery.description: Increases the length of invincibility after taking damage. Found in bastion treasure chests, nether fortresses, pillager outposts and large underwater ruins
gallery.title: Cross Necklace

gallery.description: Allows the wearer to double jump. Found in pillager outposts, large underwater ruins, end cities & mineshafts
gallery.title: Cloud in a Bottle

gallery.description: Slowly replenishes the wearers hunger while walking on grass
gallery.title: Rooted Boots

gallery.description: Applies an extra level of fortune to mined blocks. Found in treasure chests, ruined portals, strongholds & underwater ruins
gallery.title: Lucky Scarf

gallery.description: Grants immunity to knockback. Found in pillager outposts, shipwrecks, bastion treasure chests & village armorers
gallery.title: Steadfast Spikes

gallery.description: A fatal hit teleports the player somewhere else
gallery.title: Chorus Totem

gallery.description: Has a chance to strike attackers with lightning. Found in desert pyramids
gallery.title: Shock Pendant

gallery.description: Allows the wearer to see in the dark. Found in abandoned mineshafts, shipwrecks & ruined portals
gallery.title: Night Vision Goggles

gallery.description: Automatically smelts mined ores
gallery.title: Pickaxe Heater

gallery.description: Causes the wearer's melee attacks to set targets on fire. Found in ruined portals, large underwater ruins & bastion treasure chests
gallery.title: Fire Gauntlet

gallery.description: Has a chance to light attackers on fire. Found in desert pyramids & bastion stables
gallery.title: Flame Pendant

gallery.description: Increases damage dealt by the wearer. Found in pillager outposts, ruined portals, strongholds & large underwater ruins
gallery.title: Power Glove

gallery.description: Increases the wearer's jump height and prevents fall damage. Found in jungle temples, buried treasure chests, bastion stables & village tanneries
gallery.title: Bunny Hoppers

gallery.description: Increases movement speed and step height while sprinting. Found in shipwrecks, nether fortresses & village armorers
gallery.title: Running Shoes

gallery.description: Increases Lure and Luck of the Sea by 1 level
gallery.title: Angler's Hat

gallery.description: Allows the wearer to sprint on water. Found in mineshafts, buried treasure chests & strongholds
gallery.title: Aqua-Dashers

gallery.description: Increases experience dropped by creatures. Found in buried treasure chests, shipwrecks & bastion treasure chests
gallery.title: Golden Hook

gallery.description: Can be used both as a shield and as a glider
gallery.title: Umbrella (Blocking)

gallery.description: The wearer becomes temporarily immune to fire damage when hurt by fire. Found in ruined portals, shipwrecks & mineshafts
gallery.title: Obsidian Skull

gallery.description: Turns the wearer invisible. Found in desert pyramids, pillager outposts, shipwrecks & village tanneries
gallery.title: Scarf of Invisibility

gallery.description: Greatly reduces the time it takes to drink drinkable items. Found in abandoned mineshafts, buried treasure chests & nether fortresses
gallery.title: Plastic Drinking Hat

gallery.description: Allows the wearer to breathe underwater. Found in buried treasure chests, shipwrecks & large underwater ruins
gallery.title: Snorkel

gallery.description: Increases the wearer's mining speed and base mining level. Found in abandoned mineshafts, buried treasure chests & village toolsmiths
gallery.title: Digging Claws

gallery.description: Increases the wearer's maximum health. Found in bastion treasure chests, end cities & pillager outposts
gallery.title: Crystal Heart

gallery.description: Increases the wearer's flatulence. Found in desert pyramids & village tanneries
gallery.title: Whoopee Cushion

gallery.description: Attracts nearby items. Found in desert pyramids, ruined portals & shipwrecks
gallery.title: Universal Attractor

gallery.description: Increases knockback dealt by the wearer. Found in pillager outposts, nether fortresses & village toolsmiths
gallery.title: Pocket Piston

gallery.description: Decreases trading prices with villagers. Found in villages
gallery.title: Villager Hat

gallery.description: Increases the wearer's attack speed. Found in shipwrecks, buried treasure chests & village weaponsmiths
gallery.title: Feral Claws

gallery.description: Drops an artifact when killed
gallery.title: Mimic

gallery.description: Has a chance to damage attackers. Found in desert pyramids & ruined portals
gallery.title: Thorn Pendant

gallery.description: The wearer can move freely in water. Found in desert pyramids, shipwrecks & village temples
gallery.title: Charm of Sinking

gallery.description: Improves agility while swimming. Found in buried treasure chests, shipwrecks & large underwater ruins
gallery.title: Flippers

gallery.description: Allows the wearer to swim in the air for a short period of time. Found in stronholds & end cities

xaeros-minimap.description: Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked.
xaeros-minimap.title: Xaero's Minimap

xaeros-world-map.description: Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap.
xaeros-world-map.title: Xaero's World Map

yacl.description: A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft!

gallery.description: YACL looks like this on versions 1.20.5 and above.
